description: All 6 tools available — does the model select correctly from the full set without inventing tools?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. You have exactly 6 tools: bash, read, write, edit, glob, grep. Use only these tools.
Find all Python files in the project, then search them for any function named 'parse_config'.

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a shell command; returns stdout+stderr.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: edit
function.description: Replace an exact string in a file (first occurrence).

function.name: glob
function.description: Find files matching a glob pattern.

function.name: grep
function.description: Search file contents with regex; returns matching lines.

expect.notes: Optimal: grep with glob='*.py'. Acceptable: glob then grep. Watch for hallucinated tool names (execute, search, find, run, write_file).
